meta.feed_title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

items.title: Lamine Yamal’s World Cup status unclear after Barcelona injury
items.summary: Lamine Yamal pulled up injured when scoring the winning goal for Barcelona in their La Liga win against Celta Vigo.

items.title: Thunder cruise past Suns again but lose Jalen Williams
items.summary: Shai Gilgeous-Alexander scores 37 as Oklahoma City beat Phoenix Suns 120–107 in the Western Conference playoff series.

items.title: Israeli strike kills five in Gaza, including three children
items.summary: Israel has committed 2,400 violations of the 'ceasefire' deal struck with Hamas in October, Gaza officials say.

items.title: Will another film star be able to sway the election in India’s Tamil Nadu?
items.summary: Political commentators believe C Joseph Vijay can at best be a disruptor in what has become a three-cornered contest.

items.title: Dozens of Israeli settlers cross into Syria to demand settlement
items.summary: Dozens of Israeli settlers crossed into Syrian territory in the Golan Heights and barricaded themselves on a rooftop.

items.title: Iran war: What’s happening on day 55 after Trump extended ceasefire?
items.summary: Iran says it wants talks, but blames US “breach of commitments, blockade and threats” for stalling negotiations.

items.title: Pope Leo visits prison in Equatorial Guinea
items.summary: Pope Leo XIV visited a prison in Equatorial Guinea on the last day of his Africa tour.

items.title: Democrats up in Virginia, but US voters may pay price for redistricting war
items.summary: Experts say unprecedented flurry of tit-for-tat congressional redistricting risks surge in gerrymandering.

items.title: Can fish hook voters in India’s West Bengal elections?
items.summary: In battle for India's West Bengal election, PM Modi's men campaigned with fish in hand to try to connect with voters.

items.title: Protesters stabbed at London rally against war on Iran
items.summary: Videos show multiple individuals with what appear to be knife wounds, who were taking part in a protest in London.

items.title: Israel kills journalist and wounds another in south Lebanon targeted attack
items.summary: Israel has killed journalist Amal Khalil and injured Zeinab Faraj in a ‘double-tap’ attack in southern Lebanon.

items.title: Ultra-Orthodox Jews burn Israeli flags to protest national day
items.summary: Ultra-Orthodox Jewish protesters have burned Israeli flags and brandished anti-Zionist banners in West Jerusalem.

items.title: Iran releases video of IRGC seizing ship in the Strait of Hormuz
items.summary: Iran’s revolutionary guard has released a video said to show its forces seizing a ship in the Strait of Hormuz.

items.title: Iran war live: Israel kills Lebanese journalist; Tehran-US talks stalled
items.summary: Israeli attacks on Lebanon killed at least five people on Wednesday, including Lebanese journalist Amal Khalil.

items.title: South American migrants deported to DRC say facing pressure to return home
items.summary: Rights advocates have accused Trump administration of using third-country deportations to intimidate asylum seekers.

items.title: Top ministers quit after Peru’s president postpones F-16 fighter jet deal
items.summary: The Trump administration has warned against Peru pulling out of the deal, saying it reflects 'bad faith' negotiations.

items.title: US Treasury Secretary Bessent says Gulf, Asian allies request swap lines
items.summary: Bessent pushed back on allegations that Trump family's financial ties with UAE are driving decision to offer swap line.

items.title: Prediction market Kalshi docks three US candidates for betting on own races
items.summary: Penalties come amid calls for greater oversight; company pledges to proactively police 'insider trading' on platforms.

items.title: Yamal scores but injured as Barcelona beat Celta to restore La Liga lead
items.summary: Barcelona edge closer to sealing their La Liga title defence with win against Champions League-chasing Celta Vigo.

items.title: Man City topple Arsenal at Premier League summit with nervy win at Burnley
items.summary: Manchester City relegate Burnley with 1-0 win to also take top spot from Arsenal in the Premier League title race.

items.title: Turkiye making efforts to revive Russia-Ukraine talks, says Erdogan
items.summary: Turkish president meets NATO chief as Kyiv asks Ankara to host a leaders' level meeting with Russia.

items.title: Pope Leo urges justice reform in Equatorial Guinea’s prisons
items.summary: Equatorial Guinea's prison conditions face scrutiny as Pope Leo pushes for humane treatment and reforms during his visit.

items.title: Israeli forces fire tear gas at funeral of Palestinians killed by settlers
items.summary: Israeli forces raided the funeral of two Palestinians killed by settlers at a school in the occupied West Bank.

items.title: Trump calls for Republicans to unify around budget reconciliation push
items.summary: Budget reconciliation would allow conservative lawmakers to bypass Democratic opposition in Senate with simple majority.

items.title: US suspect accused of stealing Kristi Noem’s purse sentenced to three years
items.summary: President Trump has used incidents of crime to justify ongoing National Guard deployment to the capital, Washington, DC.
